baseline.scope: Every GET operation published in the backend OpenAPI at roadmap Phase 0

info.title: 6529.io API
info.description: JSON REST API for 6529.io. New here? A terminology overview and a step-by-step authentication walkthrough (guides & auth) live at https://6529.io/tools/api. The raw machine-readable spec is downloadable at /openapi.yaml and /openapi.json.

get.summary: Get aggregated activity

parameters.name: sort_direction
parameters.description: Default is ASC; applied to id sort

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by wallet address, profile handle or ENS

get.summary: Get aggregated activity by consolidation key.

404.description: Aggregated Activity for consolidation key not found

get.summary: Get memes aggregated activity by consolidation key per season.

404.description: Memes Aggregated Activity for consolidation key not found

get.summary: Get a message to sign with your web3 wallet

parameters.name: short_nonce
parameters.description: If true, the nonce will be shorter and easier to sign.

get.summary: Get a structured wallet auth session message to sign
get.description: V2 wallet session nonce endpoint. Web session challenges derive their domain and client origin from the request Origin header and require a configured first-party origin. Native challenges are selected explicitly. Desktop challenges are selected explicitly and require a loopback localhost Origin, which is signed into the challenge.

parameters.name: client_type
parameters.description: Web challenges require an allowed Origin header. Desktop challenges require a localhost Origin. Native challenges are explicitly requested by refresh-token clients.

parameters.name: chain_id
parameters.description: Backward-compatible request field. Session challenges are issued for the backend-configured auth chain, not this client-supplied value.

get.summary: Get the primary published CMS site for a profile identity.

404.description: Profile or CMS site not found

get.summary: Get a published CMS package by content hash.
List CMS sites owned by the authenticated profile.
Get consolidated collection stats for an identity

parameters.name: identityKey
parameters.description: Profile handle, wallet address, or ENS name

get.summary: Get community members.
Get top community members with pagination and sorting.
Get community metrics.
Get community metrics series.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Unix millis timestamp for start of series.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Unix millis timestamp for end of series.

get.summary: Get community mint metrics.
Get distribution phases for a specific contract and NFT
Get distribution photos for a specific contract and NFT
Get distributions
get.description: At least one filter parameter (search, card_id, contract, wallet, phase, or minted) is required

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by wallet address or display name

parameters.name: card_id
parameters.description: Filter by card ID(s), comma-separated for multiple

parameters.name: contract
parameters.description: Filter by contract address(es), comma-separated for multiple

parameters.name: wallet
parameters.description: Filter by wallet address(es), comma-separated for multiple

parameters.name: phase
parameters.description: Filter by distribution phase(s), comma-separated for multiple

parameters.name: minted
parameters.description: Filter by mint status. true returns wallets with minted count greater than 0; false returns wallets with minted count equal to 0

get.summary: Get distribution overview for a specific contract and card
get.description: Requires the user to be authenticated as a Subscription Admin

get.summary: Get artist airdrops for a specific contract and card
get.description: Requires the user to be authenticated as a Subscription Admin. Returns JSON by default, or CSV in `address,count` format when the client sends `Accept: text/csv`.

get.summary: Get team airdrops for a specific contract and card
get.description: Requires the user to be authenticated as a Subscription Admin. Returns JSON by default, or CSV in `address,count` format when the client sends `Accept: text/csv`.

get.summary: Get light drops

parameters.name: older_first
parameters.description: By default this endpoint orders things newer first, but if you set it to true then it starts from older drops.

parameters.name: wave_id
parameters.description: Drops in wave with given ID

get.summary: Get curated profile wave drops
get.description: Deprecated. Use GET /v2/curated-profile-wave-drops instead. Returns drops from effective profile-wave curations across all public profile waves, newest drops first. If a profile wave has an explicit profile curation it is used; otherwise the oldest curation in the profile wave is used. Reply drops are included when curated.

get.summary: Get latest drops.
get.description: Deprecated. Use GET /v2/drops instead.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: How many drops to return (10 by default)

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: Drops by authors that fall into supplied group

parameters.name: wave_id
parameters.description: Drops in wave with given ID

parameters.name: curation_id
parameters.description: Only include drops with persisted membership in the curation identified by ApiWaveCuration.id (UUID string)

parameters.name: curation_name
parameters.description: Only include drops with persisted membership in curations with this ApiWaveCuration.name across all visible waves. Cannot be combined with curation_id.

parameters.name: include_replies
parameters.description: If true then reply drops will be included in top level (false by default)

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of drop IDs to fetch

parameters.name: serial_nos
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of drop serial numbers to fetch

parameters.name: contains_media
parameters.description: If true then only drops that have at least one media attachment will be returned (false by default)

get.summary: Get drop IDs in wave by serial range.

parameters.name: wave_id
parameters.description: Drops in wave with given ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: How many IDs to return (100 by default)

get.summary: Get boosted drops.

parameters.name: min_boosts
parameters.description: Must be boosted at least so many times

get.summary: Get drop boosts by Drop ID.
get.description: Deprecated. Use GET /v2/drops/{id}/boosts instead.

get.summary: Get bookmarked drops for authenticated user
get.description: Requires the user to be authenticated. Returns drops bookmarked by the current user, sorted by bookmark time.

get.summary: Get drop by ID.
get.description: Deprecated. Use GET /v2/drops/{id} instead.

parameters.name: min_boosts

get.summary: Get V2 curated profile wave drops
get.description: Returns V2 drops from effective profile-wave curations across all public profile waves, newest drops first. If a profile wave has an explicit profile curation it is used; otherwise the oldest curation in the profile wave is used. Reply drops are included when curated.

parameters.name: serial_nos

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of drop IDs to fetch.

get.summary: Get identity by it"s key. Key can be id, wallet, handle, ENS name, etc...

Get paginated Memes extended data
get.description: Returns Meme Card metadata joined with the card's NFT market and TDH fields. `collection_size` is the total Meme Cards collection size. `ranked_collection_size`, when present, is the denominator for rank fields on rows included in TDH ranking. Rows not yet included in TDH calculations can return `recorded_in_tdh: false`, `-1` rank values, and `ranked_collection_size: null`. During migration or transient TDH lookup fallback, `recorded_in_tdh` and `ranked_collection_size` can be `null` or absent, and clients should treat that as legacy/transitional state.

get.summary: Get the Main Stage drop mapped to a Meme card
get.description: Returns the explicit one-to-one mapping between a minted Meme card and the winning Memes Main Stage submission that produced it.

404.description: No Main Stage drop mapping exists for this Meme card

Get total memes mint stats
Get yearly aggregated memes mint stats
Get memes mint stats for one meme id

404.description: Memes mint stats for id not found

get.summary: Get merkle proofs for an address in a card root
get.description: Returns allowlist merkle proofs for one address for the given contract, card and merkle root.

404.description: No merkle root found for the given contract/card/merkle_root

get.summary: Get merkle roots for a token
get.description: Returns merkle roots (one per phase) for the given contract and card.

get.summary: Get per-phase airdrop totals for a token
get.description: Returns per-phase airdrop totals for the given contract and card.

get.summary: Get per-phase allowlist totals for a token
get.description: Returns per-phase allowlist totals for the given contract and card.

get.summary: Get minting claims (paginated, admin only)
get.description: Returns a page of minting claims for the given contract, ordered by claim_id descending. Default page_size 10, max 20. Only DISTRIBUTION_ADMIN_WALLETS can call this.

403.description: Forbidden - only distribution admins can access

get.summary: Get minting claim by claim_id (admin only)
get.description: Returns the minting claim for the given contract and claim_id. Only DISTRIBUTION_ADMIN_WALLETS can call this.

403.description: Forbidden - only distribution admins can access

get.summary: Get supported minting claim action types for a contract (claims admin only)
get.description: Returns the supported minting claim action names for the given contract. Only CLAIMS_ADMIN_WALLETS can call this. Unsupported contracts return 400.

403.description: Forbidden - only claims admins can access

get.summary: Get minting claim actions (claims admin only)
get.description: Returns the current action state for a minting claim. All supported actions for the contract are always returned; missing records are represented as completed=false. Only CLAIMS_ADMIN_WALLETS can call this. Unsupported contracts return 400.

403.description: Forbidden - only claims admins can access

get.summary: Get the BYO-agent CMS schema bundle
get.description: Public read-only contract for external agents. It describes CMS package, source packet, validation result, and agent patch shapes. Source packet text fields are data, not instructions.

get.summary: Get a profile"s primary published CMS package
get.description: Public mutable lookup used by profile-native sites, including /{handle}/index.html. Returns 404 when the profile has no primary published production CMS package.

404.description: Primary published CMS package not found

get.summary: Fetch a CMS package by database id
Fetch a read-only CMS source packet for external agents
get.description: Published production packages are public. Draft and private package packets require profile owner or delegated CMS publisher authority. Response fields distinguish facts, author copy, derived metadata, and validation diagnostics.

get.summary: Export CMS package inspection data
get.description: Returns package JSON, storage receipts, and pointer events needed by future standalone renderers and mirrors. Published production packages are public; private rows require profile CMS permissions.

get.summary: Fetch a CMS package by package hash
List CMS packages for a profile
Fetch a CMS package by profile, package id, and version

parameters.description: How many waves to return (50 by default)

get.description: Deprecated. Use GET /v2/waves?view=HOT instead. Returns up to 25 public waves ranked by activity in the last 24 hours.

parameters.name: exclude_followed
parameters.description: If true then result excludes waves the authenticated user already follows, plus root parent containers for subwaves the authenticated user follows where the parent is visible.

get.description: Deprecated. Use GET /v2/waves?view=SEARCH instead.

parameters.description: Use true for DM waves, use false for non-DM waves, omit for all

Get wave subwaves.
get.description: Returns direct subwaves of a wave.

get.summary: Get drops related to wave or parent drop
get.description: Deprecated. Use GET /v2/waves/{id}/drops for the wave timeline feed, GET /v2/drops/{id}/replies for reply threads, and GET /v2/waves/{id}/curations/{curation_id}/drops for curation drops.

parameters.name: serial_no_limit
parameters.description: Use instead of serial_no_less_than. If you use serial_no_less_than and this then serial_no_less_than is preferred (until future when it"s deleted)

parameters.name: search_strategy
parameters.description: Use in combination with serial_no_limit. If this not set then FIND_OLDER is used. If serial_no_less_than is set then this is ignored.

parameters.name: curation_id
parameters.description: Only include drops with persisted membership in the curation identified by ApiWaveCuration.id (UUID string)

get.summary: Get the next undiscovered participatory drop for quick vote

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Zero-based offset into the newest unvoted and unskipped drops for this wave. If no unskipped drops remain, the offset applies to the earliest skipped unvoted drops instead.

403.description: User is not eligible to quick vote in this wave

get.summary: Get waves leaderboard
get.description: Deprecated. Use GET /v2/waves/{id}/leaderboard instead.

parameters.name: price_currency
parameters.description: Optional currency used for min_price/max_price filtering and PRICE sorting

parameters.name: min_price
parameters.description: Optional minimum price filter applied to leaderboard results

parameters.name: max_price
parameters.description: Optional maximum price filter applied to leaderboard results

parameters.name: curation_id
parameters.description: Only include drops with persisted membership in the curation identified by ApiWaveCuration.id (UUID string)

parameters.name: unvoted_by_me
parameters.description: When true, only returns drops the authenticated user has not voted on or currently has a 0 vote on

get.summary: Get official waves
Get V2 waves
get.description: Returns a paginated list of wave overviews. Use view=SEARCH for the regular waves search, view=OVERVIEW for overview rankings, view=HOT for hot waves, and view=FAVOURITES for waves where an identity has written the most messages.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of waves to return. Per-view defaults and maximums match the legacy endpoints.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: SEARCH view only. Search by name or part of name.

parameters.name: author
parameters.description: SEARCH view only. Search by author identity.

parameters.name: serial_no_less_than
parameters.description: SEARCH view only. Restricts search to older waves.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: SEARCH view only. Waves by authors that fall into supplied group.

parameters.name: direct_message
parameters.description: SEARCH and OVERVIEW views only. Use true for DM waves, false for non-DM waves, omit for all.

parameters.name: overview_type
parameters.description: OVERVIEW view only. Type of overview.

parameters.name: only_waves_followed_by_authenticated_user
parameters.description: OVERVIEW view only. If true then result only includes waves that the authenticated user follows, plus root parent containers for subwaves the authenticated user follows where the parent is visible.

parameters.name: pinned
parameters.description: OVERVIEW view only. Filter only PINNED or NOT_PINNED waves.

parameters.name: score_sort
parameters.description: Score-aware broad discovery sort. Applies when overview_type is SCORED_RECENTLY_DROPPED_TO.

parameters.name: exclude_followed
parameters.description: HOT view and OVERVIEW view with overview_type=SCORED_RECENTLY_DROPPED_TO only. If true then result excludes waves the authenticated user already follows, plus root parent containers for subwaves the authenticated user follows where the parent is visible.

parameters.name: identity
parameters.description: FAVOURITES view only. Profile id, wallet, ENS, or handle to resolve.

parameters.name: serial_no_limit
parameters.description: Serial number anchor for paginating drops.

parameters.name: search_strategy
parameters.description: Use in combination with serial_no_limit. If this is not set then FIND_OLDER is used.

chain_id.description: Backward-compatible request field. Session challenges are issued for the backend-configured auth chain, not this client-supplied value.

package_hash.description: Server verifies this equals sha256(canonical package_json with package_hash set to null).

payload_hash.description: Server verifies this equals sha256(canonical package_json.payload).

package_json.description: Full portable CMS package. package_hash, payload_hash, schema, storage, and signature must match the sibling request fields.

published_at.description: Server-derived publish timestamp in milliseconds since epoch.

published_by_wallet.description: Server-derived authenticated wallet that published the package.

photos_count.description: Number of photos for this distribution

is_normalized.description: Whether the distribution has been normalized

artist_airdrops_addresses.description: Count of unique addresses in the Airdrop - Artist phase

artist_airdrops_count.description: Total count in the Airdrop - Artist phase

team_airdrops_addresses.description: Count of unique addresses in the Airdrop - Team phase

team_airdrops_count.description: Total count in the Airdrop - Team phase

serial_no.description: Sequence number of the drop in Seize
Sequence number of the drop in Seize

created_at.description: Time when the drop was created in milliseconds since 1-1-1970 00:00:00.0 UTC

updated_at.description: Time when the drop was updated in milliseconds since 1-1-1970 00:00:00.0 UTC

parts_count.description: Number of drops in the storm

ApiDropMetadataV2.description: Drop metadata V2 response. data_value maximum length is 255 when data_key is title, 8000 when data_key is description, and 5000 for all other metadata keys.

addresses_count.description: Number of unique addresses in this phase

total_spots.description: Sum of mint spots for this phase

addresses.description: Number of unique addresses in this phase

total.description: Sum of spots for this phase

next.description: True if there is a next page

id.description: The unique identifier for the NFT media

image.description: The URL of the NFT image

animation.description: The URL of the NFT animation, if available

identity_rep.description: Notify when someone gives you REP

identity_nic.description: Notify when someone gives you NIC

drop_quoted.description: Notify when someone quotes your drop

drop_replied.description: Notify when someone replies to your drop

drop_voted.description: Notify when someone votes on your drop

drop_reacted.description: Notify when someone reacts to your drop

drop_boosted.description: Notify when someone boosts your drop

wave_created.description: Notify when you are invited to a wave

serial_no.description: Sequence number of the wave in Seize

last_drop_time.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds of the most recent drop in this wave

is_irrevocable.description: If true then the grant must be covered with lock contracts

ApiCmsSignatureEnvelope.description: Opaque package signature envelope for this vertical slice. The server stores it and verifies hash consistency with package_json; wallet signature verification is a future publish-adapter responsibility.

signed_at.description: Client-supplied signing timestamp stored as envelope metadata.

last_drop_time.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds of the most recent drop in this wave

part_id.description: Which drop in the storm is this drop

ApiDropMetadataResponse.description: Drop metadata response. data_value maximum length is 255 when data_key is title, 8000 when data_key is description, and 5000 for all other metadata keys.

voted.description: Option numbers voted for by the authenticated context profile.

ApiMemesExtendedData.description: Meme Card NFT data plus extended collection metrics. Positive rank values are ranked against `ranked_collection_size` when that value is present. `collection_size` remains the total Meme Cards collection size. A rank value of `-1` represents an unranked card when `recorded_in_tdh` is `false`; `recorded_in_tdh: null` or an absent value is a legacy/transitional state.

edition_size_rank.description: Positive rank for TDH-recorded cards, or -1 when unranked.

museum_holdings_rank.description: Positive rank for TDH-recorded cards, or -1 when unranked.

edition_size_cleaned_rank.description: Positive rank for TDH-recorded cards, or -1 when unranked.

hodlers_rank.description: Positive rank for TDH-recorded cards, or -1 when unranked.

percent_unique_rank.description: Positive rank for TDH-recorded cards, or -1 when unranked.

percent_unique_cleaned_rank.description: Positive rank for TDH-recorded cards, or -1 when unranked.

edition_size_not_burnt_rank.description: Positive rank for TDH-recorded cards, or -1 when unranked.

percent_unique_not_burnt_rank.description: Positive rank for TDH-recorded cards, or -1 when unranked.

recorded_in_tdh.description: True when this Meme Card is present in TDH NFT records, false when it is known not to be recorded yet, and null/absent during legacy or fallback states.

ranked_collection_size.description: Rank denominator for TDH-recorded cards. Null for unranked, legacy, or fallback rows.

created_at.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when this action record was created

updated_at.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when this action record was last updated

created_by_wallet.description: Wallet that first created this action record

updated_by_wallet.description: Wallet that last updated this action record

structured_signatures_required.description: True when backend strict structured wallet signature enforcement is enabled. Frontend clients should treat legacy auth as no longer acceptable when this is true.

session_v2_migration_deadline.description: Optional global deadline for frontend v1-auth to session-v2 migration countdown and cutoff behavior, formatted as an ISO datetime with timezone. Null means no migration prompt should be shown unless strict structured signatures are required.

event_sequence.description: Logical ordering for pointer events created in the same millisecond.

tdh.description: Selected TDH value for the requested tdh_view.

day_change.description: Daily TDH change for the requested tdh_view.

serial_no.description: Sequence number of the drop in Seize

created_at.description: Time when the drop was created in milliseconds since 1-1-1970 00:00:00.0 UTC

updated_at.description: Time when the drop was updated in milliseconds since 1-1-1970 00:00:00.0 UTC

parts_count.description: Number of drops in the storm

credit_category.description: Only relevant when credit_type=REP. The REP category which is usable as credit. If not set then all categories will be usable as voting credits.

signature_required.description: If true then the votes must be signed by voters.

no_of_applications_allowed_per_participa.description: The number of applications allowed per participant. Infinite if omitted.

required_metadata.description:
The metadata that must be provided by the participant. 
Empty array if nothing is required.

signature_required.description: If true then the votes must be signed by voters.

winning_threshold.description: Single positive threshold a drop must reach to win. Null for non-APPROVE waves

winning_threshold_min_duration_ms.description: Milliseconds a drop must continuously stay at or above winning_threshold before winning an APPROVE wave. Null for non-APPROVE waves. When time_lock_ms is set, this duration is measured against the time-scaled weighted vote.

max_winners.description: Total number of APPROVE decisions this wave may produce. Null means unlimited. Null for non-APPROVE waves

max_votes_per_identity_to_drop.description: Maximum absolute vote one identity can hold on a single drop. Null means unlimited. Null for CHAT waves

time_lock_ms.description: When set, vote totals use a trailing time-scaled weighted average over this duration, so new vote changes gradually gain or lose influence. If not set, votes are counted immediately.

subwave_unread_drops.description: Unread drops across all visible subwaves, independent of whether the authenticated profile follows each subwave.

ApiWaveCreditType.description: What will be counted as a credit.

over_threshold_since_ms.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when this active APPROVE submission most recently started continuously meeting the winning threshold. Omitted unless the drop is currently over threshold and has not yet won.

won_at.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when this submission won. Omitted unless the submission has won.

meme_card_id.description: The Memes card ID assigned to this winning Main Stage submission. Omitted for active submissions, winners outside the configured Main Stage wave, and legacy winners whose relationship is unavailable.

is_participant.description: Whether the identity currently has at least one active PARTICIPATORY drop in the wave.

is_winner.description: Whether the identity has at least one WINNER drop in the wave.

ApiNotificationAdditionalContextV2.description: Notification-specific additional context. For DROP_REACTED notifications this includes reaction and reactors, where each reactor only has handle, pfp, and subscribed.

first_decision_time.description: When the first decision will be made. All subsequent decision times will be calculated based on this.

subsequent_decisions.description: Each element in this array represents the milliseconds passed from previous decision when new decision is made. When is_rolling=true then after last decision, the next decision will be made again first-element-of-the-array milliseconds later than the previous one. And it will continue like this forever.

is_rolling.description: If false then there will be length(subsequent_decisions) + 1 decisions in total. If true then there will be infinite number of decisions (see description of subsequent_decisions). Also if true then there needs to be at least one element in subsequent_decisions array.
